news.t: Franklin Templeton Launches Franklin Multisector Income ETF (MULT)

overview.description: The Franklin Multisector Income ETF (MULT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing in a diversified portfolio of domestic and international debt securities across multiple fixed income sectors. The fund primarily seeks a high level of current income, and to a lesser extent, long-term capital appreciation. MULT was launched on Aug 26, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Launches Franklin Multisector Income ETF (MULT)
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton today announced the launch of the Franklin Multisector Income ETF (Nasdaq: MULT), a new actively managed exchange-traded fund designed to pursue ...
